reasoning: Finance and trading apps need trust, clarity, and stability. This archetype provides a grounded, mature aesthetic using warm off-whites and deep greens, avoiding the clinical coldness of typical fintech dashboards. It prioritizes data legibility and serious analytics.

rules: Base grid for dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6.
Dense and compact spacing for data, but use ample padding within cards (p-6) to prevent text collision.
Top-Left 'North Star' Metric: Place the single most critical metric in the top-left quadrant.
Optical Alignment: Align numbers to the right in tables to stack decimal points vertically.
Grid Items MUST be direct children of the grid container.

surfaces.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), NO soft shadows. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-sm.
surfaces.headers: Solid background (bg-background) with a hard bottom border (border-b border-border). No transparency.
surfaces.widgets: Use sharp edges or subtle roundness (rounded-md max). Go cardless where possible to reduce box-in-box UI.
surfaces.grid_borders: Use border-collapse style layout for tables and heavy data sections. Expose the grid.

components_strategy.buttons: Primary button in Deep Forest Green, crisp corners (rounded-md). Explicitly set hover state (hover:bg-primary/90).
components_strategy.forms_inputs: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Flat borders, clear focus ring (focus:ring-primary).
components_strategy.data_visualization: Use Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Line charts for trends, Bar charts for comparisons. Use custom success/destructive colors for profit/loss.
components_strategy.badges_tags: Use sharp edges for badges (tags/reasons). e.g., rounded-sm. Use subtle backgrounds (bg-secondary) with contrasting text.

icons_and_assets.instructions: Use Phosphor Icons (regular or duotone) for clear, mature iconography fitting a data dashboard. Install via: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react

image_urls.description: Professional smiling businessman in a suit.
Black and white portrait of an adult man wearing a suit and glasses.

animations.interactions: Hover states on all interactive elements. Micro-interactions for feedback.
animations.transitions: Use specific properties (e.g., transition-colors, transition-transform) with duration-200. No 'transition-all'.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text. Deep greens and charcoals against off-white background.
accessibility.focus: All focusable elements must have focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2
accessibility.testing: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Update /app/frontend/src/index.css with the provided HSL color variables.
Import Manrope and IBM Plex Sans via Google Fonts in index.html.
Install @phosphor-icons/react and use it for all icons.
Implement the Dashboard with a sidebar or top navigation, maintaining the 'Control Room' grid layout.
Build the 'Buy Signals' cards with flat styles, explicit borders, and clear data hierarchy.
Use Shadcn UI components for dropdowns, tabs, tables, and dialogs.
Avoid using generic bright red/green for profit/loss; use the specified success (142 40% 30%) and destructive (0 74% 42%) colors for better contrast and maturity.
